title: cestrum dubium
intro: Cestrum dubium, also known as the night-blooming cestrum, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is a member of the nightshade family and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating digestive issues. Cestrum dubium can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
